gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id GROUP BY T1.A16 ORDER BY T1.A16 DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) 
FROM district AS T1 
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id 
WHERE T1.A16 = (SELECT MAX(CAST(A16 AS INTEGER)) FROM district)
question: In the branch where the largest number of crimes were committed in 1996, how many accounts were opened?
